title: anil ovina
intro: Anil ovina, also known as Ailanthus altissima, is a deciduous tree native to China that has been naturalized in many parts of the world. Its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids, terpenoids, and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Anil ovina include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, and treating gastrointestinal problems like diarrhea and dysentery. Anil ovina can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, as well as being used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
